title: Sphaerostephanos longbawanensis
taxonomy: Sphaerostephanos longbawanensis is a species of fern in the family Drynariaceae. It belongs to the kingdom Plantae, and is further classified into the phylum Pteridophyta. The division of Sphaerostephanos longbawanensis is Pteridophyta, and it is also classified under the class Polypodiopsida. The order is Polypodiales, and the family is Drynariaceae. This classification is based on its physical characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other plant species.
parts: Sphaerostephanos longbawanensis is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. Unfortunately, there is limited information available on the specific medicinal parts of Sphaerostephanos longbawanensis.
